The '''Countermeasures Compensation Computer''', or '''C3''', was a combined [[Droid brain/Legends|brain]]/[[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] array used in [[CoMar Combat Systems/Legends|CoMar Combat Systems]]' [[G-003 Tri-Tracker]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-10-XX -->''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 1994-07-XX -->[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]
